Cequn Yang

cequnyang@gmail.com
GitHub: github.com/zuoyouTU/ | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/cequn-yang/
Open to relocation to Germany
Chinese (Native) | English (B2) | German (A2)
C++ software engineer with 8 years of experience in Windows desktop applications, client products, diagnostics tools, and SDK integration, with work spanning large-scale e-commerce workflows and UAV monitoring platforms, plus growing Qt/QML and Linux exposure for cross-platform roles.

Education

Jilin University
Sept 2013 - Jun 2017
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Engineering
Recognized degree in Germany (ANABIN H+).

Skills

  • Programming Languages: C++17/20, Python, Lua, JavaScript
  • Desktop and UI: Windows Desktop Development, MFC, duilib, Qt/QML (entry-level)
  • Platforms: Windows, Linux
  • Core Strengths: Desktop Applications, Client Architecture, SDK Integration, Diagnostics Tooling, System Integration, Troubleshooting

Professional Experience

Pinduoduo
Mar 2020 - May 2025
PC Software Developer
  • Development: Developed and maintained the Windows-based IM chat tool for merchants and consumers using C++17/20 and duilib in a product environment serving millions of merchant devices.
  • Ownership: Implemented and maintained core client workflows including message sending, synchronization, retraction, message history lookup, reminders, quick reply, and shortcut-based interactions, while supporting daily production troubleshooting.
  • Integration: Led the replacement of a core client-side data parsing library and maintained Windows-side security, risk-control, and device information collection tooling with lower-level SDK integration.
Hikrobot
Jul 2017 - Feb 2020
PC Software Developer
  • Development: Developed the desktop client of a UAV monitoring platform from 0 to 1 using C++ and MFC, covering modules, UI improvements, and debugging workflows.
  • Tooling: Built engineering and production tools with C++, Lua, Python, MFC, and internal SDKs for transmission speed measurement, factory information writing, device status simulation, and automated fault and log troubleshooting.
  • Platform Extension: Led development of an OCX plugin for an IE-based drone management platform to support real-time video and image display and key-object identification.

Selected Highlights

  • 8 years of C++ desktop and client-side software development
  • Experience in high-scale merchant-facing software and device-oriented desktop platforms
  • Strong fit for C++ Software Engineer, Desktop Software Engineer, Qt/C++ Developer, and Device-Platform Engineer roles
